summary: Iteration 78 - Complete testing of new Journal features: LLM chat assistant, manual operations CRUD, delete button, and JOURNAL_CUTOFF (2026-05-01). Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified - chat assistant, delete button, PRÉVISION command, balance updates.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend journal.py: Well-structured LLM chat endpoint using emergentintegrations with claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929
Backend: Proper JSON parsing with _strip_code_fence() to handle LLM markdown responses
Backend: Auto-categorization logic (_auto_category) correctly maps labels to categories
Backend: JOURNAL_CUTOFF='2026-05-01' properly filters all operations
Backend: Manual operations stored in journal_manual collection with source='manual' or 'chat'
Frontend JournalTab.jsx: Clean chat implementation with chatHistory state and proper loading states
Frontend: Delete button with data-testid='journal-delete-{ref_id}' and confirmation dialog
Frontend: Real-time balance updates after chat operations
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_iter78_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 78 verified new Journal features. Key data-testids: journal-chat (chat card), chat-input (input field), chat-send (send button), chat-history (message history), journal-delete-{ref_id} (delete buttons on manual operations). Backend endpoints: POST /api/journal/manual (create), DELETE /api/journal/manual/{id} (delete), POST /api/journal/chat (LLM assistant). LLM uses Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Chat commands: ENTRÉE/DÉPENSE (create_real), PRÉVISION ENTRÉE/DÉPENSE (create_forecast), SITUATION (show_balance), unknown gives examples.

backend: POST /api/journal/manual with type='entree' creates entry - PASSED
POST /api/journal/manual with type='depense' creates expense - PASSED
POST /api/journal/chat 'salut' → action=unknown, executed=false, examples in explain - PASSED
Manual operation appears in realtime with deletable=true - PASSED
Chat-created operation appears with source='chat' - PASSED
frontend: Journal tab loads with data-testid='journal-tab' - PASSED
ENTRÉE command: message sent, LLM response with ✅, balance updated, operation in list - PASSED
Delete button visible on manual operations (data-testid='journal-delete-{id}') - PASSED
Delete with confirmation: toast 'Opération supprimée', balance restored - PASSED
SITUATION command: response with 💰 emoji, executed=false - PASSED
PRÉVISION DÉPENSE command: response with 📅, forecast created - PASSED
Prévisionnel tab shows forecasts with KPIs and chart - PASSED
